items.title: Gayatri (opening)
items.translation: We meditate on the glory of the Creator who has created the universe; may He enlighten our minds.

items.title: Karmanye vadhikaraste
items.translation: You have a right to action alone, never to its fruits.

items.title: Lokah samastah
items.translation: May all beings everywhere be happy and free.

items.title: English quatrain — attention
lines: One mind can hold a single thread
Two streams divide the careful head
Eight still leave a quiet heart
items.translation: A practice verse on multi-stream attention.

items.title: Truth is one
lines: The wise call it by many names
Paths may differ in the climb
items.translation: Ekamsat vipra bahudha vadanti — rendered in English.

items.title: Silence
lines: Hold the still within the noise
And noise will do your will
